audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:mocht + subject + infinitive, dan + main clause]] and [[grammar:ongeacht of + subordinate clause]]. Use [[grammar:mocht ... dan ...]] for a possible future [[grammar:conditional clause]] and the action to take if it happens. Use [[grammar:ongeacht of]] when the result stays the same whether the following condition is true or not.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:mocht + subject + infinitive, dan + main clause]]: The [[grammar:conditional inversion]] with [[grammar:mocht]] presents a remote or precautionary [[grammar:condition]]; the [[grammar:result clause]] may be introduced by [[grammar:dan]]. [[grammar:ongeacht of + subordinate clause]]: [[grammar:Ongeacht of]] introduces a [[grammar:concessive embedded alternative]] whose truth does not affect the [[grammar:matrix-clause]] outcome.

audienceSections.normal:
#### mocht + subject + infinitive, dan + main clause

Use [[grammar:mocht ... dan ...]] for a possible future [[grammar:conditional clause]] and the action to take if it happens. Example: [[grammar:Mocht het wifi-signaal opnieuw wegvallen, dan starten we de router nog één keer op.]]

#### ongeacht of + subordinate clause

Use [[grammar:ongeacht of]] when the result stays the same whether the following condition is true or not. Example: [[grammar:Het videogesprek moet doorgaan, ongeacht of de systeemupdate vandaag klaar is.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### mocht + subject + infinitive, dan + main clause

The [[grammar:conditional inversion]] with [[grammar:mocht]] presents a remote or precautionary [[grammar:condition]]; the [[grammar:result clause]] may be introduced by [[grammar:dan]]. Literal example: [[grammar:Mocht het wifi-signaal opnieuw wegvallen, dan starten we de router nog één keer op.]]

#### ongeacht of + subordinate clause

[[grammar:Ongeacht of]] introduces a [[grammar:concessive embedded alternative]] whose truth does not affect the [[grammar:matrix-clause]] outcome. Literal example: [[grammar:Het videogesprek moet doorgaan, ongeacht of de systeemupdate vandaag klaar is.]]

audienceSections.normal: [[grammar:mocht + subject + infinitive, dan + main clause]] and [[grammar:ongeacht of + subordinate clause]]. Use [[grammar:mocht ... dan ...]] for a possible future [[grammar:conditional clause]] and the action to take if it happens. Use [[grammar:ongeacht of]] when the result stays the same whether the following condition is true or not.
audienceSections.expert: [[grammar:mocht + subject + infinitive, dan + main clause]] and [[grammar:ongeacht of + subordinate clause]]. The [[grammar:conditional inversion]] with [[grammar:mocht]] presents a remote or precautionary [[grammar:condition]]; the [[grammar:result clause]] may be introduced by [[grammar:dan]]. [[grammar:Ongeacht of]] introduces a [[grammar:concessive embedded alternative]] whose truth does not affect the [[grammar:matrix-clause]] outcome. The grammar IDs remain distinct and cumulative.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Het videogesprek met onze familie begint over veertig minuten.]] — The video call with our family starts in forty minutes.
- [[grammar:Mijn laptop ziet de netwerknaam, maar krijgt geen verbinding.]] — My laptop can see the network name but cannot connect.
- [[grammar:Ik controleer eerst de router en het modem.]] — I will check the router and the modem first.
- [[grammar:Het lampje van het wifi-signaal blijft rood knipperen.]] — The Wi-Fi signal light keeps blinking red.
- [[grammar:De storingsmelding zegt dat de kabelverbinding ontbreekt.]] — The error message says that the cable connection is missing.
- [[grammar:Misschien zit de stekker los in de stekkerdoos.]] — Perhaps the plug is loose in the power strip.
- [[grammar:Ik druk de kabel stevig vast en wacht op een herstart.]] — I will press the cable firmly into place and wait for a restart.
- [[grammar:Mocht het modem blijven vastlopen, dan resetten we het daarna.]] — If the modem keeps freezing, we will reset it afterwards.
- [[grammar:De netwerknaam verschijnt nu ook op mijn telefoon.]] — The network name now also appears on my phone.
- [[grammar:Toch is de verbindingssnelheid nog veel te laag.]] — Still, the connection speed is much too low.
- [[grammar:Ik meet de signaalsterkte in de woonkamer en op zolder.]] — I will measure the signal strength in the living room and in the attic.
- [[grammar:Ongeacht of de deur openstaat, boven blijft het signaal zwak.]] — Regardless of whether the door is open, the signal remains weak upstairs.
- [[grammar:Staat er misschien een systeemupdate klaar?]] — Could there be a system update ready?
- [[grammar:Mijn tablet wil opnieuw opstarten voordat ik hem kan koppelen.]] — My tablet wants to restart before I can pair it.
- [[grammar:Laat de systeemupdate voorlopig wachten.]] — Let the system update wait for now.
- [[grammar:Het videogesprek moet doorgaan, ongeacht of de update vandaag klaar is.]] — The video call must go ahead regardless of whether the update is finished today.
- [[grammar:Ik gebruik nu de kabelverbinding voor mijn laptop.]] — I am now using the cable connection for my laptop.
- [[grammar:Het beeld loopt niet meer vast, maar de microfoon klinkt nog zacht.]] — The picture no longer freezes, but the microphone still sounds quiet.
- [[grammar:Mocht de draadloze verbinding opnieuw wegvallen, dan gebruiken we deze kabel als reserve.]] — If the wireless connection drops again, we will use this cable as a backup.
- [[grammar:Ik reset intussen alleen de router.]] — In the meantime, I will reset only the router.
- [[grammar:Na de herstart knippert het lampje eerst oranje en daarna groen.]] — After the restart, the light first blinks orange and then green.
- [[grammar:De signaalsterkte is nu in alle kamers voldoende.]] — The signal strength is now sufficient in every room.
- [[grammar:Ik verander de netwerknaam niet, want iedereen kent die al.]] — I will not change the network name because everyone already knows it.
- [[grammar:De storingsmelding is bovendien verdwenen.]] — The error message has disappeared as well.
- [[grammar:Kunnen we mijn telefoon en Yasmins tablet opnieuw koppelen?]] — Can we pair my phone and Yasmin’s tablet again?
- [[grammar:Dan testen we het videogesprek met drie apparaten.]] — Then we will test the video call with three devices.
- [[grammar:Dat kan, ongeacht of ze hetzelfde besturingssysteem gebruiken.]] — That is possible regardless of whether they use the same operating system.
- [[grammar:De router verdeelt de verbinding automatisch.]] — The router distributes the connection automatically.
- [[grammar:Mocht iemand vanavond niets horen, dan controleren we eerst de eigen instellingen.]] — If someone cannot hear anything tonight, we will first check their own settings.
- [[grammar:We hoeven dan niet meteen het modem opnieuw te resetten.]] — Then we do not need to reset the modem immediately again.
- [[grammar:Alles blijft nu stabiel en de verbindingssnelheid is ruim voldoende.]] — Everything is now stable and the connection speed is more than sufficient.
- [[grammar:We zijn precies op tijd klaar voor het videogesprek.]] — We are ready for the video call exactly on time.
